final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing travel brochure design for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou itinerary, featuring a real map of Hangzhou as the main visual thread.

Style/medium: editorial travel brochure mockup, three-panel tri-fold layout, realistic paper craft aesthetic with die-cut elements
Composition: top-down flat lay view of three folded brochure panels, each panel floating above textured kraft card stock base with soft shadow separation
Subject: authentic Hangzhou city map as background layer with famous landmarks (West Lake, Lingyin Temple, Longjing Village, Grand Canal, Xixi Wetland) rendered as 3D embossed icons and illustrated landmarks rising above the paper surface
Scene/backdrop: clean studio tabletop setting, subtle depth of field, professional product photography lighting
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead light with gentle shadows, warm and inviting travel inspiration mood
Color palette: muted kraft paper browns as base, fresh jade green and lake blue accents for water elements, terracotta for temple markers, cream for text areas
Materials/textures: matte uncoated paper stock, subtle linen texture on card base, semi-gloss map print layer, embossed metallic foil highlights on landmark icons
Text (verbatim): "з¬¬дёҖеӨ©пјҡиҘҝж№–з»Ҹе…ёжёёпјҢжү“еҚЎж•ҷз§‘д№ҰйҮҢзҡ„жұҹеҚ— вҖҢи·Ҝзәҝпјҡж–ӯжЎҘж®ӢйӣӘвҶ’зҷҪе ӨвҶ’еӯӨеұұвҶ’жӣІйҷўйЈҺиҚ·вҶ’иӢҸе ӨжҳҘжҷ“вҶ’иҠұжёҜи§ӮйұјвҶ’йӣ·еі°еЎ”вҶ’жҹіжөӘй—»иҺә" / "з¬¬дәҢеӨ©пјҡзҰ…ж„Ҹжқӯе·һпјҢз©ҝи¶ҠеҚғе№ҙе®Ӣйҹө вҖҢи·ҜзәҝпјҡзҒөйҡҗеҜәвҶ’йЈһжқҘеі°йҖ еғҸвҶ’жі•е–ңеҜәвҶ’е®ӢеҹҺ" / "з¬¬дёүеӨ©пјҡд№қжәӘзғҹж ‘еҫ’жӯҘпјҢеҒҡдёҖж—ҘиҢ¶еұұж•Јдәә вҖҢи·Ҝзәҝпјҡд№қжәӘеҚҒе…«ж¶§вҶ’йҫҷдә•жқ‘вҶ’еҚҒйҮҢзҗ…зҸ°вҶ’дә‘ж –з«№еҫ„" / "з¬¬еӣӣеӨ©пјҡж–Үиүәж”¶е®ҳпјҢи§Јй”Ғжқӯе·һABйқў"
Constraints: must clearly show three distinct folded panels; landmarks must be recognizable silhouettes; map must be geographically accurate Hangzhou layout; floating effect achieved through realistic shadow casting
Avoid: generic stock travel imagery; blurry map details; plastic-looking 3D elements; cluttered text layout; Behance generic brochure style
